name: Probabilistic Concept-Aware Steering for Trustworthy LLM Inference

description: arXiv:2607.18259v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Steering vectors (SVs), an inference-time intervention technique for large language models (LLMs), guide the generation process by adding a concept-specific direction vector to intermediate activations during inference. However, existing SV methods frequently yield representation-incoherent behaviors that undermine interpretability and fine-graine...
author: Brian Becker, Rui Chu, Yingjie Lao
